parameters.query: ={{ 'INSERT INTO papers (user_id, filename, subject, assessment_type, num_questions, paper_text, word_count, page_count, draft_or_final, linked_paper_id) VALUES (' + ($json.user_id ? $json.user_id : 'NULL') + ', \'' + $json.filename + '\', \'' + $json.subject + '\', \'' + $json.assessment_type + '\', ' + $json.num_questions + ', \'' + $json.paper_text + '\', ' + $json.word_count + ', ' + $json.page_count + ', \'' + ($json.draft_or_final || 'draft') + '\', ' + ($json.linked_paper_id ? $json.linked_paper_id : 'NULL') + ') RETURNING id;' }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ paper_id: $node['Check Token Link'].json.paper_id, word_count: $node['Parse Extraction'].json.word_count, page_count: $node['Parse Extraction'].json.page_count }) }}
